codeReview.summary: The final commit correctly tightens foreign record-link rewriting so ordinary colon strings stay plain and adds table-agnostic RecordId compatibility for string-key ids, but the feature still under-delivers one required user-visible path: the new regression only proves save/get preservation for ordinary colon strings and does not cover or demonstrate get_record behavior even though the feature contract explicitly requires save/get/get_record to remain safe for plain colon payloads.

issues.description: ordinary_colon_strings_are_not_record_links only exercises save() and get(). The feature contract explicitly requires ordinary colon-containing strings to remain untouched across save/get/get_record paths, so the implementation lacks proof that get_record() does not re-enter a misclassification path for plain strings.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker transcript/handoff for this feature was not written into the mission handoffs or transcript log even though the feature is marked completed and has a concrete commit.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: No workerSessionId == a9c1057e-a7fe-4a18-8a30-82fd835a3309 entry was present in worker-transcripts.jsonl, and no matching handoff JSON was found under C:\Users\admin\.factory\missions\fb36f232-36a4-4e47-b2c9-192ab540f0fc\handoffs, while  eatures.json marks this worker session as the completed worker for the feature.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Because the worker transcript is missing, scrutiny cannot verify whether the rust-library-worker procedure was followed for this feature (for example, failing-test-first or scope-review steps).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: eatures.json assigns completedWorkerSessionId 9c1057e-a7fe-4a18-8a30-82fd835a3309, but there is no corresponding transcript skeleton in worker-transcripts.jsonl for procedure review.

summary: Review failed: the commit improves strict record-link classification and adds compatibility for table-agnostic string-key RecordIds, but it does not provide the required get_record() coverage/proof for preserving ordinary colon strings, and the mission artifacts are missing the worker transcript/handoff for this completed feature.
